programs.title: Lingo
programs.desc: Three sets of friends battle it out in this edition - Marta and Shane from Dursley, Ann and Joyce from West Yorkshire, and David and Sumbul from St Albans and Durham.

programs.title: Tipping Point
programs.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programs.title: The Chase
programs.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as four strangers - Erika from Oldham, Tom from East Sussex, Kim from Leamington Spa and Mark from Macclesfield - take on a Chaser.

programs.title: ITV News London
programs.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programs.title: ITV Evening News
programs.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programs.title: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programs.desc: Alison meets an excitable spaniel with a serious knee issue, a frustrated crossbreed desperate to use his nose, and helps teach sign language to a Staffy.
